theme.description: Authority, clarity, and truth. A high-contrast, editorial layout that feels like a premium writing instrument or modern publishing studio.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']

structure.navbar: Sticky top, h-16, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/85, 1px bottom border-zinc-200, z-50
structure.left_panel: w-full md:w-[380px] lg:w-[420px] bg-zinc-50 border-r border-zinc-200 p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col gap-8 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto
structure.right_panel: flex-1 bg-white p-6 md:p-12 lg:p-24 relative overflow-y-auto

grids.history_page: Bento 'Control Room' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Dense data, tight gaps, flat 1px borders.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002277] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-['Cabinet_Grotesk'] text-lg font-bold tracking-wide transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-300 hover:border-zinc-900 rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-['Manrope'] transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-['Manrope'] transition-all

inputs.text: rounded-none border-x-0 border-t-0 border-b-2 border-zinc-200 bg-transparent px-0 py-3 text-lg font-['Manrope'] focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-[#002FA7] transition-colors w-full
inputs.select: Shadcn component customized: rounded-none border-x-0 border-t-0 border-b-2 border-zinc-200 bg-transparent px-0 font-['Manrope'] focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#002FA7]

cards.style: Technical Grid Borders: border-collapse, subtle 1px border-zinc-200, flat background, no shadows unless hovered.

seo_chips.style: border border-[#002FA7]/20 text-[#002FA7] bg-[#002FA7]/5 rounded-none px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-['JetBrains_Mono']

motion.hover_states: Interactive elements translate slightly (-translate-y-[2px]) with subtle border darken.
motion.loading_state: Animated pulsing gradient or 'Tracing Beam' on the right panel over the skeleton text, using Framer Motion.

image_urls.usage: Use as a faded, muted accent image (opacity-50, grayscale) in the empty state of the preview panel before blog generation.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons in duotone weight for a technical yet editorial look.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Add font @imports to index.css and extend tailwind.config.js with the font families.
3. Build the primary interface as a Left/Right Split layout. Left panel (controls) has fixed width on desktop, right panel takes remaining space.
4. Ditch the standard 'boxy' inputs for the prompt. Use brutalist, bottom-border-only textareas and selects.
5. Use 'Playfair Display' exclusively for the generated blog preview text to simulate a premium publishing experience.
6. Include data-testid attributes on every button, input, and key container.
7. Implement the empty state using the provided Unsplash image, styled minimally.
8. Use the defined 'Control Room' grid layout for the History page.
